steps.title: Find the subject phrase
steps.content: The subject is the gerund phrase "Amplifying the voices and experiences of Black soldiers." Even though "voices" and "experiences" are plural inside the phrase, the whole activity functions as a singular subject.

steps.title: Use past singular agreement
steps.content: Choice A is plural, Choice B is plural present perfect, and Choice C is plural present tense. The sentence describes Chester during the Civil War, so it needs a singular past-tense verb.

steps.title: Complete the sentence
steps.content: The singular past-tense verb agrees with the gerund phrase and fits the historical context. The answer is D.
